recipes.title: Dal Bhat
recipes.description: Nepal's everyday platter of steamed rice, spiced lentil soup, vegetable tarkari, and tangy pickle.
steps: Cook rice with double its volume of water until fluffy.
Boil dal with turmeric and salt until completely soft.
Whisk dal smooth and add water to a soup-like consistency.
Heat ghee in a small pan and crackle cumin seeds.
Add garlic, ginger, dried chilies, and timur pepper; cook 30 seconds.
Pour the tempering over the dal.
Serve with rice, vegetable tarkari, and achar.

recipes.title: Momo
recipes.description: Steamed Nepali dumplings stuffed with spiced minced meat or vegetables, served with sesame tomato achar.
steps: Knead flour with water and salt to a firm dough; rest 30 minutes.
Combine minced chicken with finely chopped onion, ginger, garlic, coriander, and spices.
Add soy sauce, oil, and salt and mix thoroughly.
Roll dough into a long log and cut into small pieces; flatten and roll into thin discs.
Place a spoon of filling in each disc and pleat the edges to seal in a half-moon or round shape.
Steam momos for 12 minutes in a multi-tier steamer until the dough is glossy.
Serve hot with sesame tomato achar.

recipes.title: Sel Roti
recipes.description: Crispy fermented sweet rice doughnuts deep fried until golden, a Nepali festival staple.
steps: Soak rice for at least 6 hours, then drain.
Grind soaked rice with sugar, ghee, milk, cardamom, and salt to a thick smooth batter.
Rest the batter 1 hour to develop flavour.
Heat oil to 170 C in a wide deep pan.
Pour batter from a height in a circular motion to form a ring.
Fry until deep golden, flipping once for even color.
Drain and serve with yogurt or pickle.

recipes.title: Thukpa
recipes.description: Himalayan noodle soup with vegetables, meat, and a peppery garlic-ginger broth from the Tibetan border.
steps: Saute chopped onion, garlic, and ginger in oil until fragrant.
Add diced chicken and brown lightly.
Stir in tomatoes and salt; cook until softened.
Add julienned carrot, cabbage, and 1 liter of water.
Bring to a boil and simmer 10 minutes.
Add wheat noodles and cook until just tender.
Finish with soy sauce and chopped coriander; serve steaming hot.

recipes.title: Gundruk
recipes.description: Fermented dried leafy greens cooked into a tangy soup with tomato, garlic, and timur pepper.
steps: Soak gundruk in warm water for 15 minutes, then squeeze and chop.
Heat mustard oil and bloom dried chilies and timur pepper.
Add chopped onion, garlic, and ginger; saute until soft.
Stir in turmeric and chopped tomato; cook until pulpy.
Add the gundruk and toss to coat.
Pour in 600 ml water with salt and simmer 20 minutes.
Serve as a tangy side soup with rice.

recipes.title: Newari Bara
recipes.description: Newari black lentil pancakes pan-fried with a soft, savoury egg or minced meat topping.
steps: Soak urad dal overnight, then drain.
Grind dal with ginger, garlic, salt, and asafoetida to a thick fluffy paste.
Heat a flat skillet and brush with mustard oil.
Spread a ladle of batter into a small thick pancake.
Top with seasoned minced meat and a little chili powder.
Drizzle oil around the edges and cook until the underside is crisp.
Flip carefully and cook until cooked through; serve hot.

recipes.title: Aloo Tama
recipes.description: Tangy Nepali curry of potatoes, fermented bamboo shoots, and black-eyed peas in a turmeric broth.
steps: Soak black-eyed peas overnight, then boil with salt until tender.
Heat mustard oil and saute onion until soft.
Add garlic, ginger, and turmeric; cook 1 minute.
Stir in chopped tomato and cook into a thick masala.
Add potatoes, bamboo shoots, and cooked beans.
Pour in 600 ml water and simmer 25 minutes until potatoes are tender.
Crush in timur pepper and serve with rice.

recipes.title: Choila
recipes.description: Newari smoked grilled buffalo or chicken tossed with mustard oil, ginger, garlic, and timur pepper.
steps: Grill chicken thighs over charcoal or under a hot grill until charred and cooked through.
Cut into bite-sized pieces.
Heat mustard oil until smoking, then crackle fenugreek seeds.
Cool the oil slightly and pour over the grilled chicken.
Add ginger, garlic, chili powder, timur pepper, salt, and lemon juice.
Toss vigorously to coat every piece.
Garnish with coriander and serve with chiura (beaten rice).

recipes.title: Yomari
recipes.description: Steamed Newari rice flour dumplings shaped like figs and stuffed with sweet sesame and jaggery.
steps: Pour boiling water into rice flour with a pinch of salt and mix to a soft dough.
Knead well until smooth and pliable; cover and rest 15 minutes.
Toast sesame seeds, then pound coarsely.
Mix sesame with grated coconut and crushed jaggery into a sticky filling.
Take a ball of dough and shape into a hollow cup.
Fill with the sweet mixture and pinch closed into the iconic fig shape with a pointed tip.
Steam yomari for 18 minutes until the dough is glossy and translucent.
